summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Shopply multi-supermarket shopping optimization app. All core features tested including authentication, shopping list management, optimization algorithm, results with interactive map, history tracking, and settings.
passed_tests: ✅ Shopping list CRUD operations - working perfectly
✅ Core optimization algorithm - calculating cost, time, savings accurately
✅ Interactive map with Leaflet/OpenStreetMap - showing routes and markers
✅ Settings page with sliders and preferences - all controls functional
✅ Navigation between all pages (Home, Storico, Impostazioni, Risultati)
✅ Database seeding with 5 supermarkets and 280 products
✅ User statistics tracking (€5.21 total savings displayed)
✅ External navigation link to Google Maps

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major features working, 1 minor script issue)
